title: The container is privileged
evidence: Container 'app' is running with privileged: true which grants host-root access. Set privileged: false or remove the securityContext entry.

title: Resource limits absent
evidence: Container 'app' has no resources.limits set. Set CPU and memory limits to prevent Pod eviction under noisy-neighbour pressure.

title: Image uses :latest tag
evidence: Container 'app' references image 'nginx:latest'. Pin to a specific tag or digest.

title: Pod is not targeted by any NetworkPolicy
evidence: No NetworkPolicy matches Pod 'vulnerable-app' in namespace 'default'. Consider a default-deny policy.

title: CAP_SYS_ADMIN is the most privileged capability
evidence: (-30) CAP_SYS_ADMIN is the most privileged capability

title: Sharing the host network namespace allows a compromised Pod to sniff cluster traffic
evidence: (-9) Sharing the host network namespace allows a compromised Pod to sniff cluster traffic

title: An immutable root filesystem is a defence-in-depth control
evidence: (1) An immutable root filesystem is a defence-in-depth control

title: Force the container to run as a non-root user
evidence: (1) Force the container to run as a non-root user
